user.title: Add Maxspect device
user.description: Choose the type of Maxspect device to add.

gizwits_lan.title: Connect to Maxspect device
gizwits_lan.description: Enter the IP address of your Maxspect device on the local network.

icv6.title: Connect to ICV6 Controller
icv6.description: Enter the IP address of your Maxspect ICV6 controller. Connected devices (LED ramps, pumps) will be discovered automatically.

cloud.title: Gizwits Cloud account
cloud.description: Enter your Syna-G+ Cloud account credentials. These are needed to send control commands (on/off, mode changes) to the device.

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to the device. Check the IP address and ensure the device is on the same network.
error.cloud_auth_failed: Cloud login failed. Check your Syna-G+ Cloud credentials and region.
error.cloud_device_not_found: Login succeeded but no devices were found on this account. Check that the device is bound to this account in the Syna-G+ app, and that the correct region is selected.
